description:
Add a new helicopter landing zone resource to CAMEO Data Manager with the following details:

- Name: LZ North Complex
- Category: Airport (or Other)
- Address: 8500 Ballpark Road, Centerville, CA 90210
- Phone: (555) 765-4321
- Notes: "CRITICAL SAFETY INFO: Primary night LZ. Surface: Grass/Clay. Dimensions: 200x200ft. HAZARDS: 40ft light poles on South side. Wires crossing road to the North. Ground contact frequency: 123.450."

Ensure all safety information in the notes is entered exactly as specified.
